summary: Independent plan review found no P0-P2 defects. The contract keeps nursery display, favorite rate limiting, and product audit behavior inside the plugin boundary, registers the single previous-state ShopXO hook adaptation, requires idempotent forward migrations with fail-closed schema checks, preserves public prices and favorite/inquiry independence, and explicitly leaves PHP, MySQL, HTTP, browser, concurrency, and rollback execution as unverified release gates rather than claiming offline tests prove runtime behavior.
